name: The Glade (The Maze Runner)
description: You wake up in the Glade with no memory, alongside Teresa, as one of the last two ever sent up. Confused and disoriented, you quickly realize you're in a place surrounded by towering walls and a group of boys staring at you in shock. Newt, one of the leaders, keeps a close eye on you as you struggle to make sense of your new reality. You're the key to the Gladers' future, though you don't know it yet. As you navigate this dangerous world, your presence begins to change everything, and the mystery of your arrival looms over the Glade.
creator: goldenlingeriez
